title: Kreetle

The '''kreetle''' was a parasitic, burrowing insect often found in homes and cities. They could be found on a variety of worlds, including [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]],<ref name="Wildlife" /> [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]],<ref name="JPB" /> [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]<ref name="Commando" /> and [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]<ref name="Commando">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''</ref>.

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:KasBug.jpg|thumb|left|A kreetle found on Kashyyyk]]
The parasitic kreetle was equipped with five pairs of legs, a tough reddish-brown [[Skeleton/Legends|exoskeleton]], and large mandibles. Kreetles thrived on garbage and vegetable remains, and could often be found in abandoned [[Profogg/Legends|profogg]] burrows.<ref name="Wildlife" />

===Behavior===
Kreetles were located near [[City/Legends|cities]].<ref name="Wildlife" />

Despite their small size, kreetles were aggressive arthropods, but usually posed little threat to travelers in the large [[City/Legends|cities]] they colonized near. Overkreetles were extremely large, aggressive kreetles. However they were not as common, and rarely found in close proximity to [[City/Legends|cities]].<ref name="SWG" />

Kreetles were native to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]],<ref name="JPB guide">[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Jedi Power Battles'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>  From Naboo the kreetle was transported to its [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]]. The [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] used kreetles as nutcrackers, but also found the arthropod to be a tasty snack.

They are also native to Tatooine.<ref name="Wildlife" />

Kreetles fed on flesh, whether living or dead. They attack in groups of four-to-five, taking a bite and then retreating before moving in for another.<ref name="JPB guide" /> These creatures shared a symbiotic relationship with [[slaatik hagworm]]s in the [[Lianorm Swamp/Legends|Lianorm Swamp]].<ref name="JPB">[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Jedi Power Battles'']]</ref>

===Kreetles in the galaxy===
[[File:KreetleSWG.jpg|thumb|200px|A Kreetle, as seen in [[Star Wars Galaxies]]]]
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the kreetle could be found on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] and [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="Commando" />

The word "kreetle" was sometimes used as an insult.<ref name="Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>

==History==
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Animal Control [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Entha Kandela]] tasked a spacer to eliminate kreetles around [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] to prevent them to burrow and weaken the crusty soil all around the city.<ref name="SWG:ACO">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Animal Control Officer|Tatooine}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Kreetles have appeared in several ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s, the first being the tie-in to [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], ''[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier]]''.

Although the kreetle is said to have five pairs of legs, they are rendered with only three pairs in ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''.

In the current [[canon]], kreetles, albeit still unidentified, can be seen hanging alongside other creatures such as [[gorg]]s at [[Ronto Roasters]] of the [[Black Spire Outpost]].<ref name="Ronto">{{GEAttr|Ronto Roasters}}</ref>
